user.title: Select Connection Type
user.description: Select how to connect to your THZ device

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure THZ Integration
reconfigure.description: Update your THZ integration settings. You can change connection parameters, device name, area, and polling intervals.

data.refresh_pxxF2: Poll interval: Heat Request & Operating Mode (s)
data.refresh_pxxF6: Poll interval: Fan Stage & Error Log (s)
data.refresh_pxx0A0924: Poll interval: Boost DHW Total Energy (s)
data.refresh_pxx0A0928: Poll interval: Boost HC Total Energy (s)

setup_ip.title: Network Connection Setup
setup_ip.description: Configure the network connection to your THZ heat pump. Enter the IP address or hostname of your ser2net server and the port number (default: 2217).

setup_usb.title: USB / Serial Connection Setup
setup_usb.description: Configure the USB or serial connection to your THZ heat pump. Select the serial device from the dropdown and set the baud rate (default: 115200).

name.title: Device Name and Area
name.description: Optionally give your THZ device a custom name and assign it to a Home Assistant area. This helps organize your devices in the UI.

refresh_blocks.title: Configure Polling Intervals
refresh_blocks.description:
Set how often (in seconds) each register block should be polled from your heat pump. Lower values provide faster updates but increase system load. The write_interval controls how often writable entities (number/switch/select/time) are updated after changes.

Recommended: 300-600 seconds for read blocks, 60 seconds for write interval.

data.refresh_pxxF2: Poll interval: Heat Request & Operating Mode (s)
data.refresh_pxxF6: Poll interval: Fan Stage & Error Log (s)
data.refresh_pxx0A0924: Poll interval: Boost DHW Total Energy (s)
data.refresh_pxx0A0928: Poll interval: Boost HC Total Energy (s)

data_description.write_interval: How often writable entities sync their state (5-86400 seconds)

abort.reconfigured: The THZ integration has been reconfigured successfully.
abort.missing_entry_id: No config entry ID was provided. Cannot continue reconfiguration.
abort.invalid_entry_id: The provided config entry ID is invalid. Cannot continue reconfiguration.
abort.no_data_in_entry: No configuration data found in the entry. Cannot continue reconfiguration.
abort.cannot_detect_blocks: Failed to read firmware or available blocks from the device. Please check your connection and try again.

error.invalid_host: Invalid IP address or hostname. Please enter a valid IPv4, IPv6 address, or hostname.
error.invalid_port: Invalid port number. Port must be between 1 and 65535.

boost_block_time_after_pump_start.name: Boost Block Time After Pump Start
